movie.actors: Christopher Lambert, Robin Shou, Linden Ashby, Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa
movie.plot: Three unknowing martial artists are summoned to a mysterious island to compete in a tournament whose outcome will decide the fate of the world.
movie.title: Mortal Kombat
movie.writer: Ed Boon (video games), John Tobias (video games), Kevin Droney
